/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-app.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-app.dir/llama.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-app.dir/download.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-app.dir/__/license.cpp.o" -o ../bin/llama  -lllama-server-impl -lllama-cli-impl ../libllama-completion-impl.a ../libllama-bench-impl.a ../libllama-batched-bench-impl.a ../libllama-fit-params-impl.a ../libllama-quantize-impl.a ../libllama-perplexity-impl.a ../libllama-common.a ../libllama-common-base.a ../libcpp-httplib.a ../libllama.a ../libggml.a -ldl ../libggml-cpu.a ../libggml-base.a -lm /usr/lib/libgomp.so /usr/lib/libpthread.a
